purpose: Require every unrelated new idea to start in its own sandbox folder system, complete the locked AUTO BUILDER workflow, audit every TODO, and submit approved build packets to Vercel Workflow/Sandbox/Agents.
bridge_requirement: Use the autonomous GPT bridge for command/event/audit/queue/receipt/handoff when available. If unavailable, record blocker and self-heal workaround.
builder_boundary: GPT/AUTO BUILDER orchestrates, documents, queues, validates, and collects receipts. Vercel is the build/execution layer.

fallbacks.drive_folder_unavailable: Create folder manifest and queue Drive folder creation request.
fallbacks.github_mutation_unapproved: Create packet and stop before repo/branch mutation unless approved.
fallbacks.vercel_workflow_unavailable: Create Vercel Workflow handoff docs and queue submission receipt.
fallbacks.bridge_unavailable: Record blocker, produce local audit receipt, and create self-heal TODO.

acceptance_criteria: New idea recognized before normal planning continues.
Dedicated sandbox folder or folder manifest exists.
TODO audit table exists with Complete, Blocked, or Not Applicable status for every item.
GitHub and Drive search status is recorded.
Autonomous GPT bridge status is recorded.
Vercel Workflow handoff packet exists after approval.
